name: eyesight-monorepo
description: Eye-Sight monorepo — backend API + admin/portal frontend

scripts.install:all: npm run install:service && npm run install:admin && npm run install:landing
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n service,admin -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:service" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.db:seed:demo: cd eyesight-service && npm run db:fix-schema && SEED_DEMO=1 node scripts/seed-demo.js && npm run db:fix-schema
scripts.db:local:setup: npm run db:local:up && node scripts/wait-for-db.js && npm run db:sync && npm run db:fix-schema && npm run db:seed && cd eyesight-service && npm run db:stamp
